title: Flamingo - Software update for headset and charge case
scenario: DFU update for both headset and charge case can be initiated from device home screen via Update All button in Device Settings
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
2. Locate and tap the Software Update button on the Home screen.
3. Observe that the app opens Device Settings with the Software Update tab expanded.
4. Verify that an 'Update All' button is displayed at the top of the Software Update section.
5. Verify that separate update buttons are shown for the headset and the charge case.
7. Wait for the single-step DFU process to complete for both the headset and charge case.
expected: The Software Update button on the Home screen opens Device Settings with the Software Update tab expanded. An 'Update All' button is shown at the top, and separate update buttons are displayed for the headset and charge case. Tapping 'Update All' completes a single-step DFU process for both devices, leaving them on the latest firmware.
